questionHtml: Suggest why the enthalpy change of neutralization of CH3COOH is less negative than that of HCl.
markschemeHtml:
CH3COOH is weak acid/partially ionised

energy used to ionize weak acid «before reaction with NaOH can occur»

meta.title: Suggest why the enthalpy change of neutralization of CH3COOH is less negative than that of HCl.
breadcrumbLabels: 8.4 Strong and weak acids and bases
